content: Just as the language definition of reflexion includes both 'reflecting external light/images' and 'internal deliberate self-rethinking', current LLM self-reflection mechanisms have only focused on the internal self-correction dimension and ignored the 'reflection of external inconsistent perspectives' dimension. This gap gives rise to a new framework that augments LLM self-reflection by grounding it in the dual meaning of reflexion, integrating external inconsistent solution perspectives as the 'light source' that triggers internal self-reflection.
